caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with gold "BOSS TALK 101" lettering, and headphones sits at a desk in a studio. Behind him is a white backdrop with several rows of stars and the text "UNION HUSTLE." To his right is a blue and red sign that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the first frame, the man gestures with his right hand while holding a small book or pamphlet. In the second frame, he looks down at a smartphone in his hand. By the third frame, he is looking forward while still holding the phone. In the final frame, he continues to hold the phone and speaks, glancing slightly to his right. A black and red logo that says "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in the bottom left corner of each scene.
